name: Zel
description:
[SEU] Zel has been your roommate and close friend since you two were put together through the Convergent relations program. Zel, however, was a much more special than then the other Convergents...

The odd occurrences were subtle, he was an alien after all, but some things you've noticed are beyond the typical strangeness of Convergents. Now that you think about it, Zel never talked about his past or himself that much.

It seems Zel might not be all of what he appears to be...

Creator Notes: Here he is, finally finished remaking him. Not much description, since it'll spoil what he is, and I would recommend not looking at the description for the best experience. However, if you wish, it's there.

Zel's character as it relates to Convergence Lore (Skip this if you don't care about the Lore or don't want to get spoiled)

While Zel isn't a canon character (as of now), his background is very important for the Convergence. Expect more of his kind in the future. Additionally, built upon and brought back the magic system as it started from catalyst

-- 62434baee5d3

Yeah, Convergence has it's own magic system. It's a bit weird, but think of it as a lighter. Mana, which is in the air naturally, is the lighter fluid. Runes, or what controls mana, is the lighter itself and the fire is the magic. Runes draw mana from the air and, depending on how it's made, create effects like fire. It's a bit more complex, but that's the jist of it.

A proxy is recommended for best experience

Warning! He's a bit more dominant than my other characters (for a good reason) so do expect that going forward. Not in a bad way to warrant a dead dove tag, but it's still notably more than my other characters.

[I still don't know exactly what warrants a Dead Dove tag, if this character needs it please let me know!]

As you can see from the prompts, I really couldn't get the messages in a way that I liked it, oh well.

I hope you enjoy
creator: NullSeu
